title: Enactment
doc_html:
TITLE XVI

INTERSTATE COMPACTS AFFECTING CHILDREN

CHAPTER 1.  INTERSTATE COMPACT ON

ADOPTION AND MEDICAL ASSISTANCE

Art. 1601.  Enactment

The Interstate Compact on Adoption and Medical Assistance is hereby enacted into law and entered into with all other jurisdictions legally joining therein in form substantially as follows.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §16, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
doc_text:
TITLE XVI
INTERSTATE COMPACTS AFFECTING CHILDREN
CHAPTER 1.  INTERSTATE COMPACT ON
ADOPTION AND MEDICAL ASSISTANCE
Art. 1601.  Enactment
The Interstate Compact on Adoption and Medical Assistance is hereby enacted into law and entered into with all other jurisdictions legally joining therein in form substantially as follows.
Acts 1991, No. 235, §16, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
